name: simulation_supervisor
description: Coordinator, planner and supervisor multi-role orchestration.

input.message: With coder, generate a simple hello world with FastAPI in Python. No need to setup libraries, just generate the code as a text report that makes use of markdown formatting for reading. Make sure to include code examples in the final report.

Solution should match the given criteria in the query.

input.message: According to Sun-Tzu, what is the pinnacle of excellence?
